ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bond_yields" (
  "bond_yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond yield record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the bond yield data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the bond yield data is from */,
  "maturity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the maturity of the bond yield data */,
  "yield_value" REAL /* Yield value of the bond */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the bond yield data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_yields_maturity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maturity_id") REFERENCES maturities ("maturity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bond_yields_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maturities" (
  "maturity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maturity */,
  "maturity_name" TEXT /* Name of the maturity (e.g., 1M, 3M) */,
  "maturity_period" TEXT /* Period of the maturity (e.g., 1 month, 3 months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maturity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV, Database) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "maturity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maturity */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data collection (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_maturity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maturity_id") REFERENCES maturities ("maturity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "bond_yield_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond yield data */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-1) */,
  "anomalies_detected" INTEGER /* Number of anomalies detected in the data */,
  "quality_report" TEXT /* Detailed quality report for the data */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Degree to which the data is complete */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Degree to which the data is consistent */,
  "timeliness" REAL /* Degree to which the data is up-to-date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_bond_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_yield_id") REFERENCES bond_yields ("bond_yield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "data_source_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for accessing specific data sources */,
  "maturity_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for accessing specific maturities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bond_yield_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond yield data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the data (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bond_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_yield_id") REFERENCES bond_yields ("bond_yield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data link */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "bond_yield_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond yield data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_bond_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_yield_id") REFERENCES bond_yields ("bond_yield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "bond_yield_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond yield data */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., spike, drop) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the anomaly */,
  "detected_by" TEXT /* User who detected the anomaly */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_bond_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("bond_yield_id") REFERENCES bond_yields ("bond_yield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "maturity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maturity */,
  "predicted_yield" REAL /* Predicted yield value */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-1) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., MAE, MSE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_maturity_id FOREIGN KEY ("maturity_id") REFERENCES maturities ("maturity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_used FOREIGN KEY ("model_used") REFERENCES models ("model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM, Prophet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "bond_yield_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bond yield data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "data_source" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_segments_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the documentation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_documentation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES bond_yields ("bond_yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_documentation_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
